title: ARH Chairperson, Kemi Olokode-Ayelabola Hails Tinubu On Planned Cabinet Reshuffle - FinancialEDGE
description: A behavioral, developmental and child/young persons care professional, Kemi Olokode-Ayelabola has applauded President Bola Ahmed Tinubu for considering cabinet reshuffle after almost 17 months in office, just as she said leadership holds the potential of heralding a period of positive change for county's democratic process to flourish. Kemi who is the Chairperson and Convener
html: A behavioral, developmental and child/young persons care professional, Kemi Olokode-Ayelabola has applauded President Bola Ahmed Tinubu for considering cabinet reshuffle after almost 17 months in office, just as she said leadership holds the potential of heralding a period of positive change for county’s democratic process to flourish.
